012221211200201000111102202102 - ASI: 22

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  02 = 0 * 2
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  20 = 2 * 0
  22 = 2 * 2
  012 = 0 * 12
  102 = 1 * 02
  202 = 2 * 02
  0001 = 00 * 01
  0201 = 02 * 01
  1120 = 11 * 20
  2212 = 22 * 12
  11102 = 11 * 102
  202102 = 202 * 102
  0122212 = 012 * 2212
  11200201 = 1120 * 0201
  000111102 = 0001 * 11102
  000111102202102 = 000111102 * 202102
  012221211200201 = 0122212 * 11200201
  012221211200201000111102202102 = 012221211200201 * 000111102202102
